submission.name: Acme Chat Assistant
submission.description: A customer-support chat assistant hosted in eu-west-1. Conversations are encrypted in transit and retained for 30 days. PII is masked before any text leaves our network. The underlying model is a llama-style open-weights model; Acme does not train on customer data. Subprocessors: a single cloud hosting provider.
submission.intended_use: Drafting first-line support replies for human agents to review.
